scenarios.title: Massive Varied Schedule
scenarios.description: Large successful schedule with many manufacturing orders, quantities, maintenance windows, and mixed DAG shapes.

scenarios.title: Maintenance Split
scenarios.description: Small successful schedule where one work order must pause across a maintenance window before a dependent work order can run.

scenarios.title: Multi-Parent Merge
scenarios.description: Successful DAG with two independent predecessors that must both finish before assembly can start.

scenarios.title: Dependency Cycle Error
scenarios.description: Invalid sample where A depends on C, C depends on B, and B depends on A.

scenarios.title: Impossible Window Error
scenarios.description: Invalid sample where the work order needs more working minutes than can fit inside its own start/end window.

scenarios.title: Missing Dependency Error
scenarios.description: Invalid sample where a work order references a predecessor that does not exist.
